title: Popover
subtitle: Interactive floating content component with support for text, templates and dynamic components. Unlike Tooltip, the popover can contain interactive elements such as buttons, forms or lists.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.description: Simple popover with text content. The popover is displayed on click (default behavior).

colors.title: Colors and variants
colors.description: Supports all NUI colors and variants (Solid, Outline, Ghost) to customize the popover appearance.
colors.note: Combine color and variant to adapt the popover style to your design.

positions.title: Positions
positions.description: Control the preferred popover position: top, bottom, left or right. The popover repositions automatically if there is not enough space.

events.title: Activation events
events.description: Define how the popover is activated: click (default), hover, focus or manual. Manual mode allows complete programmatic control.
events.note: When using nuiPopoverEvent we have three modes: 'click' (show/hide on click), 'hover' (show on mouse over and hide on mouse out) and 'focus' (show on focus and hide on blur).

template.title: Custom template
template.description: Use Angular templates for rich, interactive content. The template context provides a close function to close the popover.
template.note: The #popoverTemplate template receives a context with the close() function that you can use to close the popover from inside the template.

component.title: Dynamic component
component.description: Render full Angular components inside the popover. Ideal for forms, lists or complex content.

delays.title: Show/hide delays
delays.description: Configure delays in milliseconds before showing or hiding the popover. Useful for improving the user experience in hover mode.

customization.title: Customization
customization.description: Customize the popover appearance: no arrow, custom width, own CSS classes or larger separation offset.
customization.note: You can use nuiPopoverShowArrow to hide/show the arrow, nuiPopoverMaxWidth to define a maximum width, nuiPopoverMinWidth to define a minimum width, nuiPopoverClass to add custom CSS classes, and nuiPopoverOffset to adjust the distance between the popover and the target element.

closeOptions.title: Close options
closeOptions.description: Control how the popover can be closed: outside click, Escape key, or allow multiple popovers open simultaneously.
closeOptions.note: Use nuiPopoverCloseOnOutsideClick to close on outside click, nuiPopoverCloseOnEscape to close with Escape, and nuiPopoverAllowMultiple to allow multiple popovers open at the same time.

backdrop.title: Backdrop
backdrop.description: Adds a dark background behind the popover to create a modal-like experience. You can control whether clicking on the backdrop closes the popover.
backdrop.note: Use nuiPopoverBackdrop to enable/disable the backdrop and nuiPopoverCloseOnBackdrop to control whether clicking the backdrop closes the popover.

disabled.title: Disabled state
disabled.description: Dynamically control whether the popover is enabled or disabled.
disabled.note: When nuiPopoverDisabled is true, the popover will not show or respond to events.

nuiPopover.description: Plain text, Angular template (TemplateRef), or dynamic component (Type<any>) to render inside the popover

nuiPopoverPosition.description: Preferred position relative to the trigger element. Repositions automatically if there is not enough space

nuiPopoverEvent.description: Event that triggers the popover: 'click' (default), 'hover', or 'focus'

nuiPopoverColor.description: NUI semantic color for the popover panel

nuiPopoverVariant.description: NUI visual variant for the popover panel

nuiPopoverShowDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before showing the popover

nuiPopoverHideDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the popover. In hover mode without explicit configuration, a minimum of 100ms is applied automatically to allow moving the cursor to the popover

nuiPopoverDisabled.description: Disables the popover completely — no events are processed

nuiPopoverClass.description: Custom CSS class added to the popover container panel

nuiPopoverShowArrow.description: Shows an arrow pointing toward the trigger element

nuiPopoverCloseOnOutsideClick.description: Closes the popover when clicking outside the panel

nuiPopoverCloseOnEscape.description: Closes the popover when pressing the Escape key

nuiPopoverMaxWidth.description: Maximum width of the popover (any CSS length value)

nuiPopoverMinWidth.description: Minimum width of the popover (any CSS length value)

nuiPopoverOffset.description: Distance in pixels between the popover panel and the trigger element

nuiPopoverData.description: Arbitrary data passed to a dynamic component or template via context

nuiPopoverAllowMultiple.description: Allows multiple popovers open simultaneously. When false, opening a popover closes all others

nuiPopoverBackdrop.description: Shows a translucent dark backdrop behind the popover panel

nuiPopoverCloseOnBackdrop.description: Closes the popover when clicking the backdrop (only effective when nuiPopoverBackdrop is true)

nuiPopoverZIndex.description: Z-index of the popover overlay for stacking order control

nuiPopoverAriaLabel.description: Accessible label (aria-label) for the role="dialog" panel. Required for template or component content where the text cannot be auto-derived

nuiPopoverAriaLabelledBy.description: ID of a visible heading element inside the popover that serves as its accessible name (aria-labelledby). Takes precedence over nuiPopoverAriaLabel

nuiPopoverShow.description: Emitted when the popover becomes visible

nuiPopoverHide.description: Emitted when the popover is hidden

methods.title: Methods
methods.description: Public methods of the nuiPopover directive, accessible via template reference.
methods.note: Access the directive instance via template reference: #myPopover="nuiPopover", then call myPopover.show(), etc.

show.description: Shows the popover. Returns true if the process started, false if already visible or disabled

hide.description: Hides the popover. Returns true if the process started, false if already hidden

isOpen.description: Returns true if the popover is currently visible

config.title: PopoverConfig
config.description: Interface for global popover configuration via provideNUI({ popover: {...} })

position.description: Default position relative to the trigger element

popoverClass.description: Default CSS class applied to the popover

closeOnClickOutside.description: Close on outside click by default

allowMultiple.description: Allow multiple popovers open simultaneously by default

context.title: PopoverContext
context.description: Interface for the context available in popover templates via let-close="close" and let-data="data"

close.description: Function to close the popover from inside the template or component

data.description: Optional data passed to the popover from the parent component via nuiPopoverData

tokens.title: Injection tokens
tokens.description: Tokens for injecting data and functions into dynamic popover components

POPOVER_DATA.description: Injection token for the data passed to a dynamic popover component. Inject with inject(POPOVER_DATA)

POPOVER_CLOSE.description: Injection token for the close function of the popover. Inject with inject(POPOVER_CLOSE)

spacing.title: Spacing and dimensions
spacing.description: CSS variables to control the size, padding and spacing of the popover

rows.distance: Distance from the trigger element to the popover

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: CSS variables to control the font of the popover content

rows.fontSize: Font size of the popover content
rows.fontWeight: Font weight of the popover content
rows.lineHeight: Line height of the popover content

borders.title: Borders
borders.description: CSS variables to control the borders and radius of the popover

shadow.title: Shadow
shadow.description: CSS variable to control the popover shadow

rows.shadow: Box shadow of the popover for visual depth

zindex.title: Z-index
zindex.description: CSS variable to control the stacking order of the popover

rows.zIndex: Z-index of the popover to control stacking order

animation.title: Animation
animation.description: CSS variables to control popover transitions and animations

rows.transitionDuration: Duration of the popover enter/leave transitions

roles.title: ARIA roles and attributes
roles.description: The Popover implements the ARIA non-modal dialog pattern. The trigger announces whether the popover is open and indicates the relationship with its content.

expanded.description: The trigger carries aria-expanded reflecting whether the popover is visible (true) or not (false).

controls.description: aria-controls on the trigger points to the id of the popover panel.

haspopup.description: aria-haspopup="dialog" indicates that the trigger opens an interactive content panel.

role.description: The popover panel has role="dialog" and aria-label derived from its title or content.

id.description: The popover panel has a unique id that is referenced by the trigger via aria-controls.

label.description: The popover panel gets its accessible name from a visible title or an explicit aria-label so that screen readers can correctly identify it.

labelledby.description: If the popover panel has a visible title, aria-labelledby is used pointing to the id of the title to provide its accessible name.

naming.title: Accessible name
naming.description: The popover and its trigger must have accessible names that clearly communicate their purpose.
naming.note: Always provide an aria-label or a visible title in the popover so screen readers can correctly identify it.

trigger.description: The trigger must have its own accessible name (visible text, aria-label…) that describes the action that opens the popover.

labelledBy.description: If the popover panel has a visible title, it must have a unique id that is referenced by the panel via aria-labelledby to provide its accessible name.

label.description: If the popover panel does not have a visible title, it must have an explicit aria-label that describes its content so that screen readers can correctly identify it.

auto.description: If the popover panel has a visible title, the popover will automatically use that title as its accessible name without the need for an additional aria-label.

keyboard.title: Keyboard interaction
keyboard.description: The Popover follows the WAI-ARIA non-modal dialog keyboard pattern.

enterSpace.description: Opens or closes the popover when the trigger has focus.

escape.description: Closes the popover and returns focus to the trigger.

tab.description: Cycles focus between interactive elements inside the open panel.

setup.title: Global Configuration
setup.description: The Popover component supports global configuration via provideNUI(). This allows you to define default values once at the application level, avoiding repetition.
setup.note: Global configuration acts as default values and can always be overridden per instance using directive inputs.

defaults.title: Configurable properties
defaults.description: The following properties can be configured globally via PopoverConfig:

rows.position: Default preferred position: top, bottom, left or right. The popover repositions automatically if space is insufficient.
rows.showDelay: Default delay in milliseconds before the popover is shown.
rows.hideDelay: Default delay in milliseconds before the popover is hidden.
rows.showArrow: Whether to display the directional arrow pointing to the trigger element.
rows.closeOnClickOutside: Whether clicking outside the popover panel closes it.
rows.closeOnEscape: Whether pressing the Escape key closes the popover.
rows.maxWidth: Default maximum width of the popover panel (CSS value, e.g. 320px or auto).

priority.title: Resolution priority
priority.description: NUI resolves configuration values using the following priority chain (highest wins):
